reading_units.text: 至誠之道，可以前知。國家將興，必有禎祥；國家將亡，必有妖孽；見乎蓍龜，動乎四體。禍福將至：善，必先知之；不善，必先知之。故至誠如神。

layers.translation_en: It is characteristic of the most entire sincerity to be able to foreknow. When a nation or family is about to flourish, there are sure to be happy omens; and when it is about to perish, there are sure to be unlucky omens. Such events are seen in the milfoil and tortoise, and affect the movements of the four limbs. When calamity or happiness is about to come, the good shall certainly be foreknown by him, and the evil also. Therefore the individual possessed of the most complete sincerity is like a spirit.

chapter.text: 至誠之道，可以前知。國家將興，必有禎祥；國家將亡，必有妖孽；見乎蓍龜，動乎四體。禍福將至：善，必先知之；不善，必先知之。故至誠如神。

source_title: 四書章句集注 : 中庸章句
